public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as cell broker.
manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a cell broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of cell broker in and around Agricultural Syndicate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Agricultural Syndicate workable through the obligations of cell broker while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around Agricultural Syndicate, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of cell broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Garren Stonecarve needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Agricultural Syndicate before trust collapses.
Garren Stonecarve can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Garren Stonecarve read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Agricultural Syndicate: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
